summary: Iteration 10: Full frontend testing of i18n removal and French-only interface. All pages display correctly in French with no react-i18next errors. Cadence module shows new improved rituals correctly.

issues: One report period shows 'Semana del' (Spanish) instead of 'Semaine du' (French) - this is AI-generated content mixing languages, not an i18n issue

critical_code_review_comments: i18n removal complete: package.json no longer contains react-i18next, i18next, or any related dependencies
All tested pages display French text correctly without i18n errors
Cadence module improved with 7 varied rituals per time period (21 total across morning/afternoon/evening)
No useTranslation or t() function calls remaining in the tested files (index.tsx, home.tsx, cadence.tsx, mirror/index.tsx, dream-dictionary.tsx, soul-report.tsx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n removal complete. All pages verified working in French. Cadence module has new varied rituals based on time of day (7 rituals each for morning/afternoon/evening).

index_page_french_text.details: Index page displays: 'Latence', 'by Atelier Benamer', 'Continuer avec Apple', 'Continuer en invité' all in French

mood_selection_french.details: All 12 moods displayed in French: Serein, Joyeux, Rêveur, Mélancolique, Fatigué, Inspiré, Anxieux, Nostalgique, Perdu, Reconnaissant, Contemplatif, Éveillé

energy_selection_french.details: Energy labels in French: 'Ton énergie', 'Comment te sens-tu physiquement ?', 'Épuisé', 'Plein d'énergie'

home_page_french.details: Home page displays all menu items in French: Cadence, Sagesse, Lettre à soi, Rituels, Méditation, Miroir de l'âme, Écrire, Sceller, Rêves, Oracle des rêves, Dictionnaire onirique, Rapport de l'âme, Cosmos

cadence_improved_rituals.details: Cadence page displays new improved rituals. Tested afternoon rituals (7 found): Micro-pause sacrée, Ancrage sensoriel, Souffle de libération, Étirements conscients, Question profonde, Écriture automatique, Marche méditative. All with detailed French descriptions.

mirror_page_no_i18n_errors.details: Mirror page loads correctly with French text: 'Miroir de l'Âme', mode buttons (Réflexion, Analyse, Question), placeholder 'Écris ce qui te traverse...'. No i18n errors in console.

dream_dictionary_no_i18n_errors.details: Dream Dictionary page loads correctly with French text: 'Dictionnaire Onirique', 'Rechercher un symbole...', 'X SYMBOLES DANS TON DICTIONNAIRE'. No i18n errors in console.

soul_report_no_i18n_errors.details: Soul Report page loads correctly with French sections: Résumé, Parcours émotionnel, Thèmes dominants, Éclairages oniriques, Pistes de croissance, Focus recommandé, Affirmation, 'Générer un nouveau rapport', 'Rapports précédents'. No i18n errors.

no_react_i18next_module_errors.details: Console logs verified - no 'react-i18next' module errors. Only standard deprecation warnings for shadow* style props.

console_warnings_observed: [expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web
